before.rootText: Frequently asked questionsHow do I choose a component pattern?-Start with the user action, then compare the state, layout, and feedback examples before implementing.How do you make holy water?+You boil the hell out of it, then keep the answer collapsed until the user asks for it.What do you call someone with no body and no nose?+Nobody knows. The important part is that the disclosure button and panel stay connected.Why do you never see elephants hiding in trees?+Because they are really good at it. Long answer copy should expand without shifting unrelated controls.Why can't you hear a pterodactyl go to the bathroom?+Because the P is silent. The open row announces its content while closed rows remain compact.
